title: Complicated Bees
description: A data-driven implementation of diploid bees for modern versions of minecraft
body: Do you wish bees were more complicated? Do you miss features (that a certain much older mod had) that certain modern bee resource mods don't have, like actual diploid genetics? Do you really want to keep reading these rhetorical questions? Find bees in the world, domesticate them, and crossbreed them to generate infinite resources - honey, mob drops, even ore resources like diamonds and netherite! This mod is also _extremely_ configurable - almost everything in the mod can be configured and changed; add new bee species, combs, recipes, and more with a datapack - no extra addon mods required! JEI is HIGHLY recommended to see recipes, mutations, and bee products. Patchouli is also recommended to enable an in-game guide to the mod. ### Features * Bees! * Genetics! * Tools and armor! * Building blocks! * Foods! * [A full wiki explaining how to use the mod as well as how to configure the mod using datapacks!](https://github.com/ACCBDD/complicated_bees/wiki) * If Patchouli is installed, a fully complete guidebook to explain the mod in-game! ### Credits - ACCBDD for all original code - SirSengir for the [mod that inspired this one (+ some textures)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forestry) - Abbie5 for the EMI integration
